home.title: Frontend Development and Webdesign
home.description: Hi, I am Mirja, Frontend developer with a strong background in building complex web applications, combining solid programming expertise with a deep understanding of user-centric design.

senior4cast.title: Senior Frontend Developer
tasks: Responsibility for frontend architecture, technical setups, and scalability
Development of a design system and automated testing workflows
Close collaboration with backend engineers and data scientists
Moderation and shared responsibility for sprint plannings and refinements

frontend4cast.title: Frontend Developer
tasks: Conceptualization and introduction of a design system
Development of new features and UI/UX improvements
Performance optimizations through refactoring and code reviews
Introduction of coding standards and automated tests

offensichtbar.title: Frontend Developer and Webdesigner
tasks: Concept and development of interactive learning platforms, web applications, games, and corporate websites
UX and UI design, component development, frontend implementation, launch, and ongoing product support
Technical project leadership including requirements analysis and client consulting
offensichtbar.clients: Clients (among others): Dior (LVMH) • Shiseido • NORDMETALL-Stiftung • Wärme Hamburg (via compactteam)

artDirectorFreelance.title: Art Director (freelance)
tasks: Concept, execution, and supervision of branding and print projects
artDirectorFreelance.clients: Clients (among others): World Vision (via greenkern) • Schroedel Schulbuchverlag (via kapieren.de) • KASSELWASSER (via roberts)

krowne.title: Art Director
tasks: Leadership of corporate design and publishing projects, development of consistent brand identities

graphicDesigner.title: Graphic Designer (freelance)
tasks: Editorial design and packaging for agencies
graphicDesigner.clients: Clients (among others): Hapag Lloyd (via the Ad Store) • Bombardier (via Salz)
